CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2014 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-24-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtna Nd Mtn To Vacate Void Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-24-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF INVESTMENT RETRIEVERS, INC.'S Motion To Vacate Void Judgment is Granted. No opposition filed. The Court signed the order that was submitted with the moving papers. Judge: Richard A. Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

Ntc Of Mtna Nd Mtn To Vacate Void Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-17-2014 Continued To Mar-24-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: JEFFREY FLETTERICK, ESQ., 916.933.8641, FOR PLAINTIFF INVESTMENT RETRIEVERS, INC.; NO OTHER APPEARANCES.

RULING: Matter discussed. The Court vacates its tentative ruling and continues hearing on PLAINTIFF INVESTMENT RETRIEVERS, INC.'s Motion To Vacate Void Judgment to March 24, 2014 at 9:30 am in Department 302. Counsel shall immediately provide courtesy copies of the motion or a proof of service in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Counsel for plaintiff to provide notice of new hearing date. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976
